config.html:
Scaffold từ DQHF — form gốc: frmCommercial_InvoiceAdd
Nút WinForms gốc: Đóng · Lưu · Thêm sản phẩm
Nút cần gắn thêm: Xoá (procedure/records.delete) · In (cần print template entity) · Xuất (export)
Proc cần port: TR_COMMERCIAL_INVOICE_DETAIL_DELETEBYID, TR_COMMERCIAL_INVOICE_DETAIL_GETALL, TR_COMMERCIAL_INVOICE_DETAIL_GETBYID, TR_COMMERCIAL_INVOICE_DETAIL_INSERT, TR_COMMERCIAL_INVOICE_DETAIL_UPDATE, TR_COMMERCIAL_INVOICE_GETBYID, TR_COMMERCIAL_INVOICE_INSERT, TR_COMMERCIAL_INVOICE_UPDATE, TR_ORDER_GET2, TR_ORDER_GETALL, TR_ORDER_GETALLBYCUSTOMER, TR_ORDER_GETBYSTATUS, TR_ORDER_GETCONTAINER, TR_ORDER_GETLIST, TR_ORDER_Get3
Entity phụ (lookup/filter cân nhắc thêm): tr_hehang, tr_khachhang, tr_list_destination, tr_list_paymentterm, tr_loaisp, tr_order, tr_order_replacement, tr_sanpham
